CLEARSTEM: Last few moments! Grab your free BOUNCEBACK serum ($98 value)!

We 💗the smoothing effects of this serum. There's nothing like her!

Grab yours free when you spend $75, just add BOUNCEBACK to your cart, use code RESTORE at checkout. Ends tonight at midnight!⏰

Shop Now: https://clearstem.attn.tv/aKah_yAkSqVr.
Hi was your team able to find out?
Never received an answer
CLEARSTEM: Really sorry to hear that. I have already sent you a message last Nov 9, 2024 about our team's response to your concern. You can scroll up to see the message I sent.
I didn't receive any response

CLEARSTEM: I'm sorry about that. Let me resend it. My message goes like this:

"Thanks for your patience! I just heard from the team. Thanks for reaching out to us! Communication is everything! It sounds like there's a missing piece in the puzzle, and we are here to help!

Our products have been tested rigorously, but everyone's skin is unique, and we want you to understand yours better.

Here are the big questions to ask yourself that contribute to acne that very often get overlooked Please read and digest them thoroughly and take each one seriously, or you may never get to a place of peace with your skin. It should take you about 20 minutes to really analyze these factors and double-check all your skincare, makeup, and vitamins.

1. Have you completely removed all pore-clogging ingredients from your makeup, lotions, other skincare products, and hair products? This is step 1 and it is absolutely crucial or you will just be re-clogging your pores. Here is our Pore Clogger Checker https://clearstem.attn.tv/aW2QMXzbqx4F!

2. Are you using any retinols or tretinoin/ Retin-A? We generally advise against using these (or just take a long break) because they are notorious for causing long-lasting purging and high irritation. The white cream Retin-A actually has isopropyl myristate which is a major pore-clogger.

3. Are you consistently using VITAMINSCUB and CLEARITY and allowing CLEARITY to fully penetrate for at least 10-15 minutes? If we do not let CLEARITY sit by itself for 10-15 minutes it will not have enough time to unclog the pore.

4. Do any of your vitamins have excessive B12, excess Vitamin D, excess Zinc, or high levels of Biotin? We recommend staying below 125% RDV for these nutrients in supplement form to eliminate variables (unless expressly directed by your physician)

5. Are you supplementing with a vitamin product that has a lot of Ashwaganda or Rhodiola in it? (Think of green juices or "adaptogen" items). These can spike testosterone and cause hormonal acne in some people.

6. How often are you consuming eggs, soy, whey protein, gluten, or dairy? These will all contribute to acne"

conversation.message_text: Cariuma: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/fon

Cariuma: Hey! It's Ben, your personal shopper at CARIUMA. If you need sneaker recommendations, help navigating our website, or answers to your questions, you know who to text.

By the way - your welcome gift is here! Once you've added sneakers to your cart, check the box that reads 'Add Extra Insoles' and enter code*: STAYCOZY at checkout. https://cariuma.attn.tv/ak23lax4PgUp 

*Exclusions apply.

Cariuma: Hey! It's Travis at Cariuma. 

You left a little something in your cart, let us know if we can help you make a final decision! https://cariuma.attn.tv/ap678ArVgcln
What is the soonest I can get these shoes?
If I order them today?

Cariuma: Hi Deborah, this is Su. We ship via multiple shipping partners and once shipped, it will take 3 to 5 business days domestically and internationally. We also offer express shipping which starts at USD $4.95 and takes 2-4 business days. So if you order them today with standard shipping, the estimate delivery is 3-5 days from today. If you're in a hurry then I suggest you avail the express shipping. I hope this helps you decide to purchase them. Let me know if you need further assistance and I'm happy to help.
Ok thank you. You offered me a promo with offered free express shipping is that still on?
Cariuma: Can you please confirm the promo that was offered to you so I can confirm this?
It's not showing up anymore.  It was showing up early this morning morning now is gone!
It was added to price in the cart..
Was free

Cariuma: I see. For free shipping, this is the available promo code that we have: EXPRESS2024. When you check out, please enter it in the "discount code or gift card" box and click "Apply," and it should automatically give you free shipping. Let me know how it goes, and if you have further questions, I'm here to help.
Ok thank you!
Cariuma: No worries. Feel free to reach out if there's anything I can help with, and in the meantime, check out our best sellers here: https://cariuma.attn.tv/sl/8V6cDKEk
So I got an offer that if I refer a friend I get $30 off my next purchase how do I get the $30 discount off my next purchase?

Cariuma: To get the $30 discount, you need to share your unique referral link with your friend. Once they make a purchase using your link, you'll receive an email with your $30 discount code. You can find your referral link in your account dashboard on our website. Let me know if you need further assistance!
Oh I see. They need to make a purchase first! Ok
The Salvas White Premium Leather Ice logo sneaker shows as $129 and when I put it in my cart it jumps to $149
Why is this

Cariuma: I'm sorry for the confusion. The Salvas start at $129 and this price applies to the colors White LWG Leather/Ice, White LWG Leather/Black, and White LWG Leather/Leopard & Black. I hope this clarifies.
So the price shows online before I add it to the cart at $129 for White Lwg leather/ice Salvas why does it switch to $149 when I add it to the cart! Doesn't make sense
Cariuma: I'm so sorry about any confusion. The shoe price doesn't change on my end. Could you please provide more details and a screenshot of what you are looking at? I'm happy to help.
Ok so I have it in a previous cart and is showing $129 so will try to pay from that screen
Cariuma: Alright, let me know how it goes.
Ok it did it again switched price to $149 after putting in payment info

Cariuma: I see. I'm afraid the current price of the Salvas in White Premium Leather/Ice is really $149, based on the product page here: https://cariuma.attn.tv/sl/4S4LtY8I If you'd like, you can get the White LWG Leather/Ice instead for $129 here: https://cariuma.attn.tv/sl/6rEnHqvV
Oh I see

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items
